## Security Audit Report

### [CRITICAL] Reentrancy in Vault.withdraw

The withdraw function does not follow checks-effects-interactions.

### [HIGH] Missing Access Control on TokenSale.setPrice — TokenSale.sol:14-21

Anyone can call setPrice.

### [MEDIUM] Unchecked Return Value in Bridge.transfer

The return value of the external call is not checked.

### [LOW] Gas Optimization in Storage.update

Using storage when memory would suffice.

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| Critical | 1 |
| High | 1 |
| Medium | 1 |
| Low | 1 |
